opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: These sores in my mouth are so painful I can't even swallow a sip of tap water without wincing. I haven't been able to drink anything all day.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The pain has got so bad over the last three days that I can't eat or drink, and paracetamol isn't helping at all.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 3 days ago it started as a mild tingling on the inside of my lower lip
symptom_narrative.duration: 3 days, and it's at its worst today
symptom_narrative.character: burning, stinging sore spots inside my mouth that hurt whenever anything touches them
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst I've ever had it — I can't eat, drink or talk properly
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: inside my lower lip and the inside of my cheeks
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant, and the pain peaked today
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really — I tried paracetamol and it didn't touch it
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: swallowing, talking, and anything I try to eat or drink
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: no fever, no swollen glands in my neck, and I didn't have any blisters before the sores came up
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I get sores like this every few months, usually when I'm really stressed, but they've never been this bad
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't keep any fluids down because of the pain and I'm feeling tired and washed out from not eating or drinking

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: recurrent mouth ulcers that come back every few months, usually during stressful periods

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: no regular medicines; I've tried over-the-counter paracetamol for this with no relief

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; has been under a lot of stress lately; normally independent but feeling run down today from not being able to eat or drink

objective_data_offered.value: on video, a few small round sores inside the lower lip and cheeks with a whitish-yellow centre and a red rim; the roof of the mouth and tongue look clear
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-directed phone camera in poor lighting; the patient could not open her mouth fully because of pain

objective_data_offered.value: 36.9 C measured with a home thermometer, no fever
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on an uncalibrated home thermometer

objective_data_offered.value: lips and the inside of the mouth look a bit dry
